validation.mobileDigits: Mobile number must be exactly 9 digits

validation.passwordPattern: Password must contain at least one letter, one number, and one special character

validation.confirmPasswordNoSpace: Confirm password cannot start with a space

bankDetails.heading: Add Bank Details
bankDetails.subHeading: Welcome to We Move All! Please login to your account.

validation.bankNamePattern: Bank name should only contain alphabets and spaces

validation.accountNumberDigits: Bank account number should only contain numbers

validation.accountHolderPattern: Account holder name should only contain alphabets and spaces

verificationModal.infoText: Bank details cannot be updated until approved by the admin.
